title: [DO NOT MERGE] Test Packit
body:
Signed-off-by: Lokesh Mandvekar <lsm5@fedoraproject.org>

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **NOT APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *lsm5* To complete the [pull request process](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process), please assign **tomsweeneyredhat** after the PR has been reviewed. You can assign the PR to them by writing `/assign @tomsweeneyredhat` in a comment when ready. The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman).
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - **[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/master/OWNERS)** Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
hmm the packit process seems to add rpms and tarball to git, which seems undesirable at first glance. Gotta check further if that's helpful at all.

> blocked on [packit/notifications#355](https://github.com/packit/notifications/issues/355)

Entire containers org has been granted access now.

> hmm the packit process seems to add rpms and tarball to git, which seems undesirable at first glance. Gotta check further if that's helpful at all.

Hey @lsm5, I think this is b/c `packit init` was used with `--upstream-ref` or some other source-git specific option, in which case packit will try to set up a source-git repo, but I don't think this is your intention in this case.

Generally when setting up Packit to help you with testing a project in Fedora Linux, you would just run `packit init` in the repo root, without any options and add the spec-file. Please check out our [onboarding guide](https://packit.dev/docs/guide/) for more details, or let me know if there is anything else I could help with.

And sorry for the confusion, we definitely need to improve this part of the CLI so that it's less confusing.
A friendly reminder that this PR had no activity for 30 days.
Going through old PRs. Closing since it doesn't look needed anymore. Feel free to reopen if I am mistaken.
